mapper.select: select id, nickname, account, avatar, bio, role, location, followers from profile order by id limit 1
select id, nickname, account, avatar, bio, role, location, followers from profile where id = #{profileId} limit 1
select skill from profile_skill where profile_id = #{profileId} order by sort_order, id
select id, label, url from profile_link where profile_id = #{profileId} order by sort_order, id

select t.id, t.name, count(a.id) as article_count from tag t left join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id left join article a on a.id = at.article_id and a.status = 'PUBLISHED' and a.deleted = 0 group by t.id, t.name, t.sort_order order by t.sort_order, t.id
select id, phone, password, create_time, profile_id, role from `user` where phone = #{phone} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into profile ( nickname, account, avatar, bio, role, location, followers ) values ( #{nickname}, #{account}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{role}, #{location}, #{followers} )
insert into `user` ( phone, password, profile_id, role ) values ( #{phone}, #{password}, #{profileId}, #{role} )
insert into profile_skill (profile_id, skill, sort_order) values (#{profileId}, #{skill}, #{sortOrder})
insert into profile_link (profile_id, label, url, sort_order) values (#{profileId}, #{label}, #{url}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: select role from `user` where id = #{userId} limit 1

select count(distinct a.id) from article a
inner join article_tag at on at.article_id = a.id
where a.status = 'PUBLISHED' and a.deleted = 0
and at.tag_id = #{tagId}

select count(*) from article where deleted = 0
and status = #{status}
select count(*) from tag
select count(*) from question

select id, title, summary, cover, category, content, status, author_user_id, review_time, reviewer_user_id, reject_reason, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, published_at, updated_at, views, likes, comments from article where id = #{id} and status = 'PUBLISHED' and deleted = 0

select id, title, summary, cover, category, content, status, author_user_id, review_time, reviewer_user_id, reject_reason, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, published_at, updated_at, views, likes, comments from article where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select t.name from tag t inner join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id where at.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.sort_order, t.id
mapper.insert: insert into article ( title, summary, cover, category, content, status, author_user_id, review_time, reviewer_user_id, reject_reason, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, published_at, updated_at, views, likes, comments ) values ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{category}, #{content}, #{status}, #{authorUserId}, #{reviewTime}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{rejectReason}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}, #{deletedBy}, #{publishedAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{views}, #{likes}, #{comments} )
mapper.update: update article set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover = #{cover}, category = #{category}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from tag where name = #{name} limit 1
select max(sort_order) from tag
mapper.update: update article set status = 'PENDING_REVIEW', updated_at = #{updatedAt}, reject_reason = null, review_time = null, reviewer_user_id = null where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update article set status = #{status}, reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into article_review_record ( article_id, reviewer_user_id, before_status, after_status, approved, reject_reason, review_time ) values ( #{articleId}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{approved}, #{rejectReason}, #{reviewTime} )
mapper.update: update article set deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, title, description, answer_count, updated_at from question order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 10
select t.name from tag t inner join question_tag qt on qt.tag_id = t.id where qt.question_id = #{questionId} order by t.sort_order, t.id
